summary: A web app where users submit documents and get structured data back.

architecture.notes: A Next.js frontend talks to a FastAPI backend over REST. The backend persists to Postgres and runs document processing inline for now. Billing is handled by Stripe.

components.name: API service
components.description: FastAPI backend exposing REST endpoints and business logic.

components.name: Database
components.description: Postgres storing users, documents, and extracted data.
